title: Fabrication of Z-scheme Bi2WO6/CNT/TiO2 heterostructure with enhanced cephalexin photodegradation: Optimization and reaction mechanism
type1_summary: No clearly replot-ready cleaned/processed dataset files were identified from the provided files.
type2_summary: No clearly raw/unprocessed measurement dataset files were identified from the provided files.
classification_notes: The paper itself reports an experimental photodegradation study but provides no data availability statement or repository-linked dataset evidence. The two Zenodo files are PDFs with no accessible internal data structure in the inspection report, so conservative classification is 'other' for both.
